items.answer_explanation: Black has a dangerous kingside pawn majority. By pushing f4, Black attacks the e3 pawn and creates a strong pawn phalanx with e4. If White captures back with exf4 or gxf4, Black can recapture with the rook (Rxf4), placing the rook on a dominant square behind the passed e4 pawn and eyeing the weak pawns on f2, g2, and h2. This move puts maximum pressure on White's structure and converts Black's space advantage.
